response.justification: While the candidate meets the educational requirement with 17+ years of experience and demonstrates strong software engineering and performance optimization skills, they lack the core hardware expertise essential for this Principal-level role. There is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture experience, or deep learning workload optimization, which are fundamental to the position. The candidate's background is exclusively in software development, whereas this role requires deep systems and hardware engineering expertise in AI accelerators.
strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the educational requirement with demonstrated senior/staff-level technical judgment
Proven performance optimization expertise including low-latency systems, asynchronous I/O, caching, and high-performance database design in distributed environments
Broad system architecture experience across multiple domains including cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and microservices
concerns: Complete absence of SoC or IP modeling experience, a core responsibility of the role
No deep learning or AI workload optimization expertise; AI-agent infrastructure experience appears to be high-level tooling rather than performance optimization
Lack of GPU architecture, hardware performance profiling, or accelerator optimization experience—entire background is software rather than hardware engineering
